name: paper-easy
description: Query Papers Easy arXiv and Hugging Face paper feeds through MCP.

interface.longDescription: Paper Easy connects Codex to a self-hosted paper reader with cached arXiv daily papers, watched-author papers, and Hugging Face Daily Papers through an authenticated MCP endpoint.
defaultPrompt: Use Paper Easy to show today's Hugging Face Daily Papers.
Use Paper Easy to list cached arXiv papers for watched authors.
Use Paper Easy to query recent cs.AI daily papers.
